case_title: WANDA MCCARLEY VS. MCKESSON CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTCIE OF COORDINATION OF ADD-ON ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARLEY, WANDA
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST DATABANK, A MISSOURI CORPORATION
THIS CASE IS DEEMED AN INCLUDED ACTION IN THE REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631, PURSUANT TO ORDER COORDINATING ADD-ON ACTIONS, DATED DEC-19-2011.
NOT REPORTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-16-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, COORDINATED WITH JCCP 4631 ON DEC-19-2011. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 304

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARLEY, WANDA AS TO DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION FIRST DATABANK, A MISSOURI CORPORATION WYETH PHARMACEUTICALS, INC., INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ESI LEDERLE, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION PFIZER, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION SCHWARZ PHARMA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION SCHWARZ PHARMA AG, A FOREIGN CORPORATION UCB GMBH DBA SCHWARZ PHARMA AG, A FOREIGN CORPORATION ALAVEN PHARMACEUTICAL LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION QUALITEST PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
